## ✅ Functional Requirements

| ID | Requirement | Priority | Raised By |

| FR-01 | The system shall display a sales data dashboard accessible to authorized users | High | Product (Sarah) |
| FR-02 | Admin users shall be able to create and delete user accounts without IT involvement | High | Product (Sarah) |
| FR-03 | The system shall maintain an audit log of user login activity visible to admins | High | Product (Sarah) |
| FR-04 | The system shall support data export to Excel format | High | Finance (Priya) |
| FR-05 | Users shall be able to filter dashboard data by date range | High | Customer Success (Tom) |
| FR-06 | The system shall support a self-service password reset flow via email | Critical | Customer Success (Tom) |
| FR-07 | The system shall send automated email notifications to users | Medium | Product (Sarah) |

## ⚙️ Non-Functional Requirements

| ID | Requirement | Metric |
|---|---|---|
| NFR-01 | Login page shall load within an acceptable response time | Target: <2 seconds (current: 4–5s — critical issue) |
| NFR-02 | The system shall support concurrent access during peak periods | Target: 200 simultaneous users (Finance month-end scenario) |

---

## 📝 User Stories

**FR-01 — Sales Dashboard**
> As an authorized user, I want to view a sales data dashboard so that I can monitor performance metrics relevant to my role.

**FR-02 — Admin Account Management**
> As an admin, I want to create and delete user accounts directly so that I can manage team access without depending on IT.

**FR-03 — Audit Log**
> As an admin, I want to see a log of who logged in and when so that I can monitor system access for security purposes.

**FR-04 — Export to Excel**
> As a Finance team member, I want to export dashboard data to Excel so that I can perform further analysis in my existing workflow.

**FR-05 — Date Filter**
> As a user, I want to filter dashboard data by date range so that I can view information relevant to a specific time period.

**FR-06 — Password Reset**
> As a user, I want to reset my password myself so that I can regain access immediately without waiting 2 days for IT support.

**FR-07 — Email Notifications**
> As a user, I want to receive email notifications about important system events so that I stay informed without checking the dashboard constantly.

---

## ✅ Acceptance Criteria

**FR-06 — Self-Service Password Reset (Critical)**
- User can initiate password reset from the login page without being logged in
- System sends a reset link to the user's registered email within 60 seconds
- Reset link expires after 24 hours
- User is redirected to login page upon successful password reset
- IT team receives zero manual password reset requests post-launch

**NFR-01 — Login Performance**
- Login page renders fully in under 2 seconds on a standard broadband connection
- Performance is validated under load with 50+ concurrent users

---
